{{Quote|Those strong enough to take it deserve the power.|Moff Bandor|<ref name="GCQ" />}}
'''Bandor''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Questal/Legends|Questal]]. Bandor championed the [[Hurlothrumbic Generator]] project: a device which could stimulate the brain into feeling fear.

{{Char-stub}}

==Personality and traits==
With his [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and close-cropped black [[Hair/Legends|hair]], Bandor was considered attractive by Human standards, although a little gruff. Measuring 1.90 [[Meter/Legends|meters]], he also had a weightlifter physique.<ref name="GCQ" />
